items.title: headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
items.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。

items.title: markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.description_zh: 用于将文件和 Office 文档转换为 Markdown 的 Python 工具。

items.title: ECC
items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
items.description_zh: 代理利用性能优化系统。 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等的技能、直觉、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发。

items.title: Scrapling
items.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
items.description_zh: 🕷️ 一个自适应网页抓取框架，可以处理从单个请求到全面抓取的所有内容！

items.title: hermes-webui
items.description: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!
items.description_zh: Hermes WebUI：从网络或手机使用 Hermes Agent 的最佳方式！

items.title: flowsint
items.description: A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.
items.description_zh: 一个用于可视化、灵活且可扩展的基于图形的调查的现代平台。适用于网络安全分析师和调查人员。

items.title: VoxCPM
items.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
items.description_zh: VoxCPM2：用于多语言语音生成、创意语音设计和逼真克隆的无分词器 TTS

items.title: machine-learning-for-trading
items.description: Code for Machine Learning for Algorithmic Trading, 2nd edition.
items.description_zh: 算法交易机器学习代码，第二版。

items.title: supermemory
items.description: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.
items.description_zh: 内存引擎和应用程序速度极快，可扩展。 AI时代的内存API。

items.title: Open-LLM-VTuber
items.description: Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms
items.description_zh: 通过免提语音交互、语音中断和跨平台本地运行的 Live2D 面部识别功能与任何LLM交谈
